name: lock contracts: acquiring a section lock writes `_locks.<section>.holder` and `_locks.<section>.expires` per §2.7
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/lock-acquire.sh" --section rubric --holder $$ --expires-in 60 && grep -E '"holder":' .claude-tdd-pro/lock.json 1>&2 && grep -E '"expires":' .claude-tdd-pro/lock.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
